name: The Bull's Chamber
description:
This room is in TOTAL dissaray.  Items seem to have been swept of the room's
numerous shelves and just dumped on the floor.  The room has an unfamiliar
smell, and you wrinkle your nose in disgust.  An great sliding window is open
to the south and leads to the balcony, and a heavy iron door is to the east.

extra_descriptions.description: The shelves have been swept clean.
Its a great, big walk-through window.
